valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Mon 11 May 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Tue 12 May 2026
general_synopsis: Low Trafalgar 1010, slow moving, filling 1016 by midday tomorrow. Low German Bight 997 moving slowly southeast and losing its identity
